questions.question: Name three of the four movie stars in the popular film White Christmas.
questions.answer: Rosemary Clooney, Vera Ellen, Danny Kaye, Bing Crosby

questions.question: Two years after her debut, what classic couple was introduced to children in 1961?
Who was the "First Lady of Country Music" who sang "Stand by your Man"?
Name the international celebrity who won the Nobel Peace Prize in 1952, known as a pastor, scholar, author, concert organist, and medical missionary.
